title: CEO Player Character — Full Redo
description: Redo the CEO player-controlled character: continuous WASD movement, camera follow, click/deselect separation, visual distinction, collision feedback, proximity highlights.

scope.in: Player movement engine (characters.ts), canvas input handling (CanvasOffice.tsx), camera scroll follow, renderer visual effects (renderer.ts), OfficeState additions, constants
scope.out: Renderer pipeline restructuring, tileset changes, sprite sheet modifications, AI agent FSM changes

dod.criterion: Holding WASD moves CEO continuously tile-by-tile
Camera smoothly tracks CEO with deadzone
CEO visually distinct with crown and glow
Click-to-move and click-to-select are separate interactions
Keyboard input works regardless of UI panel focus
Walking near agents highlights them
Collision feedback when walking into walls
Type-check passes

tasks.title: Continuous WASD movement with held-key tracking
tasks.scope: Replace keydown-only handler with keydown+keyup held-keys tracking on window. Store heldKeys Set on OfficeState. In updateCharacter(), auto-queue next tile when step completes. Add blur handler to clear keys.

dod.criterion: Holding WASD moves CEO continuously tile-by-tile without releasing the key
Key listeners are on window, not canvas — keyboard input works regardless of focus
Movement direction changes immediately when switching held keys mid-walk
Releasing all keys stops movement at the next tile boundary
Arrow keys work as aliases for WASD

tasks.title: Camera follow via programmatic scroll tracking
tasks.scope: In animation loop, compute CEO screen position. If outside deadzone, lerp scroll parent container. Use CAMERA_FOLLOW_LERP. Set cameraFollowId. Initial scroll-to-CEO on load.

dod.criterion: CEO character stays visible in viewport as they walk
Scroll follows with smooth lerp, not instant snap
Deadzone prevents jitter on small movements
cameraFollowId is set and consumed (no longer dead code)
Manual scroll by user is respected — camera only re-centers when CEO moves outside deadzone

tasks.title: Separate click-to-move from click-to-deselect
tasks.scope: In processClick empty-space branch, remove deselection calls (keep only walkToTile). Apply same to touch handler. Add Escape key handler on window for deselection.

dod.criterion: Left-clicking empty floor moves CEO without deselecting current selection
Pressing Escape deselects the currently selected agent/item
Clicking an agent still toggles selection (unchanged)
Clicking furniture still selects it (unchanged)

tasks.title: Distinct CEO character appearance with crown and glow
tasks.scope: In renderScene, for isPlayerControlled characters: draw gold outline using existing getOutlineSprite mechanism. Add small crown SpriteData (7x5 pixel art) above head. Add CEO constants.

dod.criterion: CEO character has a visible golden crown drawn above their sprite
CEO character has a subtle glow/outline distinct from selection highlight
Crown and glow render correctly at all zoom levels
Other agents are visually unchanged
isPlayerControlled flag on Character is used to determine CEO rendering

tasks.title: Collision feedback when walking into walls
tasks.scope: Add collisionFlash state to OfficeState. Set on walkToTile failure. Tick timer in update(). Render fading red overlay on blocked tile in renderFrame.

dod.criterion: Walking into a wall or blocked tile shows a brief red flash on that tile
Flash fades out over ~0.3 seconds
Flash does not persist — one-shot visual indicator
No flash on successful movement

tasks.title: Proximity highlight when CEO walks near agents
tasks.scope: Add isNearPlayer boolean to Character type. In OfficeState.update(), compute proximity to CEO. In renderScene, draw soft gold outline for nearby characters. Pulse alpha slightly.

dod.criterion: Agents within 2 tiles of CEO get a visible proximity highlight
Highlight is visually distinct from selection and hover highlights
Highlight updates in real-time as CEO moves
Highlight disappears when CEO moves away
isNearPlayer flag is added to Character type
